meta.title: GANA · PayFi - The World's First Yield-Generating Web3.0 Payment Infrastructure
meta.description: GANA uses stablecoins as the unit of account, LP liquidity pools for settlement, connecting Web2 merchants, Web3 wallets, and on-chain assets, transforming payments from a cost center into a value network participated by users, merchants, LPs, and ecosystem partners.

hero.title: The World's First
hero.subtitle: GANA uses stablecoins as the unit of account, LP liquidity pools for settlement, connecting Web2 merchants, Web3 wallets, and on-chain assets, transforming payments from a cost center into a value network participated by users, merchants, LPs, and ecosystem partners.

product.title: Product Definition
product.subtitle: What is GANA?
product.description: GANA is the world's first yield-generating Web3.0 payment infrastructure. It uses stablecoins as the unit of account, LP liquidity pools for settlement, connecting Web2 merchants, Web3 wallets, and on-chain assets.
product.vision: Transforming payments from a cost center into a value network participated by users, merchants, LPs, and ecosystem partners.

onChain.title: On-Chain First
onChain.description: Each payment generates Proof-of-Pay, recording amount, time, and address for reconciliation, dispute resolution, and open data collaboration.

lp.title: LP Settlement Support
lp.description: LP liquidity pools provide 24/7 settlement capability, aiming to reduce cross-border payment waiting times and return partial fees to LPs.

compliance.title: Invisible Compliance
compliance.description: Through regional whitelists, licensed partners, and risk screening, complex compliance is handled at the platform level, lowering entry barriers for users and merchants.

items.title: High Fees & Hidden Costs
items.description: Traditional cross-border payment fees reach 3-8%, plus exchange rate markups and multiple intermediaries. GANA reduces costs through on-chain settlement and LP pools.

items.title: Long Settlement Cycles
items.description: International remittances typically take 3-5 business days. GANA achieves near real-time settlement with stablecoins and on-chain confirmation.

items.title: Compliance Complexity
items.description: KYC/AML requirements vary across jurisdictions. GANA simplifies compliance through regional whitelists and licensed partners.

items.title: Low Capital Efficiency
items.description: In traditional payment networks, funds are locked across multiple nodes. The LP model enables idle funds to generate yield.

user.title: End Users
items: Pay for Web2 subscriptions, gift cards, and cloud services with on-chain assets
Cross-border freelancers can settle instantly with stablecoins
High-frequency users earn points, rebates, or LP equity bonuses

merchant.title: Merchants
items: Accept both stablecoins and fiat channels, reducing cross-border fees
On-chain payment receipts improve reconciliation efficiency and reduce disputes
Small cross-border merchants enter global markets with lower barriers

partner.title: Ecosystem Partners
items: Wallets integrate payment features to increase user retention and transaction frequency
Fiat on/off-ramp providers expand stablecoin payment usage
Risk control and data partners optimize models based on payment data

security.title: Security, Audit & Compliance
items: Smart contracts submitted for third-party audit (link will be updated when audit report is published)
Multi-sig wallets manage core assets to reduce single-point risks
Collaborating with licensed partners to progressively obtain required operational qualifications
User data follows minimization principles, sensitive information encrypted
Mainnet launch on BNB Chain
First merchant integrations
LP pool launch
Multi-chain expansion
Fiat on/off-ramp channels
Merchant SDK release
Mobile App
More stablecoin support
Enterprise API
Global compliance expansion
Institutional products
Ecosystem fund

footer.disclaimer: Risk Warning: Crypto asset investment carries high risk with volatile prices. The content on this website is for reference only and does not constitute investment advice. Please make cautious decisions after fully understanding the risks.

media.title: Media Coverage & Ecosystem Endorsements
media.subtitle: GANA has received widespread attention and support from top global media and ecosystem partners

resources.title: Resource Pack & Global Community
resources.subtitle: GANA is building a distributed financial network centered on decentralized payments and liquidity incentives. Multilingual documentation is now live.
resources.announcementTitle: GANA global community is now live
resources.announcementCopy: Through smart contracts and stablecoin payment protocols, GANA is building a secure, efficient, and low-fee payment system.
resources.videoDescription: A front-end ready brand video for the homepage, introduction pages, and resource center.

imBeta.title: Mystery Ecosystem Reservations
imBeta.subtitle: GANA community privileges are opening reservation registration for first-wave user eligibility. Verify GANA LP wallet eligibility first, then complete the email code reservation to receive priority updates.
imBeta.serviceNote: Verify GANA LP wallet eligibility first. Email codes unlock after the wallet check passes.
imBeta.privacyNote: Only your verified email and authorized wallet address will be used for eligibility notices, invite delivery, and reservation confirmation.
imBeta.codeSentStatus: GANA LP wallet eligibility passed. Email code sent. Enter the code from your inbox to finish the reservation.
imBeta.verifiedStatus: Email verification completed. We will send updates and invite links to this inbox when first-wave eligibility opens.
imBeta.missingEmailStatus: Enter a valid email address first.
imBeta.missingCodeStatus: Enter the email verification code first.
imBeta.errorStatus: Verification failed. Check the email address, code, or Dynamic email settings and try again.
imBeta.walletFirstStatus: Verify GANA LP wallet eligibility before receiving the email code.
imBeta.registrationSavedStatus: Email verification completed. Wallet address and GANA LP balance were recorded.
imBeta.registrationSaveErrorStatus: Email verification completed, but the backend record could not be saved. Ask an admin to check storage configuration.
imBeta.walletServiceNote: Connect a wallet and sign to read the GANA LP balance on BNB Smart Chain.
imBeta.walletSignatureNote: The signature only proves wallet ownership. It will not transfer funds or approve token spending. Eligibility requires GANA LP ≥ 1.
imBeta.walletConnectPromptStatus: Connect an EVM wallet in the Dynamic modal, then return here to sign and check eligibility.
imBeta.walletUnavailableStatus: No browser wallet detected. Install or open an EVM wallet such as MetaMask, OKX, Rabby, or Trust Wallet and try again.
imBeta.walletInvalidStatus: The current wallet is not a valid EVM address. Switch to a wallet that supports BNB Smart Chain.
imBeta.walletEligibleStatus: Wallet signature complete. GANA LP balance meets the requirement, so email codes are now enabled.
imBeta.walletIneligibleStatus: Wallet authorized, but the GANA LP balance does not meet the requirement.
imBeta.walletErrorStatus: Wallet authorization or balance reading failed. Confirm the wallet connection and try again.
imBeta.reservationReadyStatus: Email verification and wallet eligibility are complete. First-wave eligibility updates will be sent to the verified inbox.
points: Unlock email codes after GANA LP balance is ≥ 1
Complete the email code reservation and record eligibility
imBeta.comingSoonDescription: GANA community privileges are opening reservation registration for first-wave user eligibility. The email verification reservation entry will open here when ready.
imBeta.comingSoonNote: The email OTP flow is preserved and can be enabled when reservations open, with eligibility updates sent to verified inboxes.
